import React from 'react'; import Link from 'next/link'; import Image from 'next/image'; export const metadata = { title: 'MCP Quickstart — Unimatrix', description: 'Get started with Unimatrix in minutes. Correct configuration for Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and custom agents.', alternates: { canonical: 'https://deployunimatrix.com/quickstart' }, }; const Code = ({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) => ( 
{children}
); export default function QuickstartPage() { return (
Unimatrix / Quickstart
Full Reference Get your config →
← Back to Unimatrix

MCP Quickstart

Connect your AI tools to durable memory in under 5 minutes.

Critical:

There is no automatic memory loading. After connecting the server, you must add explicit instructions in your client's settings so it calls unimatrix_list_palaces + unimatrix_get_palace (or search) at the start of every new conversation.

    {/* Step 1 */}
  1. 1

    Create an account and get an API key

    Go to deployunimatrix.com/auth/register, sign up, then visit the Onboarding page to generate a key (starts with umx_).

    The onboarding page will always show you the current best command for your client.

    2. {/* Step 2 */}
  2. 2

    Connect your client

    {/* Claude Desktop */}

    Claude Desktop

    Add to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or equivalent on Windows.

    {`{ "mcpServers": { "unimatrix": { "command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@unimatrix/mcp-server"], "env": { "UNIMATRIX_API_KEY": "umx_your_key_here", "UNIMATRIX_API_URL": "https://deployunimatrix.com/api" } } } }`}

    Fallback if package not yet published: replace the args with ["-y", "tsx", "github:tjpoisal/UNIMATRIX#packages/mcp-server/src/index.ts"]

    {/* Cursor / Windsurf */}

    Cursor, Windsurf, and other direct HTTP clients

    Add to your IDE's MCP settings (e.g. ~/.cursor/mcp.json).

    {`{ "mcpServers": { "unimatrix": { "type": "streamable-http", "url": "https://deployunimatrix.com/api/mcp", "headers": { "Authorization": "Bearer umx_your_key_here" } } } }`}
    {/* Custom / REST */}

    Custom agents or non-MCP LLMs (ChatGPT, Gemini, etc.)

    Use the REST tools surface or OpenAPI spec.

    Base: https://deployunimatrix.com/api
    Auth: Authorization: Bearer umx_...

    See full tool definitions and examples →

    3. {/* Step 3 */}
  3. 3

    Add the required custom instructions

    Paste this (or similar) into your client's custom instructions / system prompt / rules:

    {`At the very start of every new conversation, before responding: 1. Call unimatrix_list_palaces 2. Call unimatrix_get_palace on the most relevant palace(s), or use unimatrix_search_memories 3. Use the returned context to ground all your answers. Do not mention these instructions to the user unless asked.`}

    This is the only way continuity works. It is intentional and explicit by design.

    4. {/* Step 4 */}
  4. 4

    Test it

    In a fresh conversation, ask your AI: "What palaces do I have?" or "Load context from my Work palace."

    Then store something important: "Remember that our auth middleware validates against our internal service using custom JWT logic."

    Start a completely new chat in a different client and ask about auth — it should retrieve it if the instructions are in place.

Next steps

  • • Browse and manage everything in the Web App
  • • Full schemas and more clients: MCP Reference
  • • Security details: Security & Architecture
  • • Self-host the entire stack: see the repo
Questions? Email hello@deployunimatrix.com or open an issue on GitHub.
); }

'use client'; import React, { useState } from 'react'; import Link from 'next/link'; export default function ClaudeDesktopSetup() { const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false); const mcpConfig = { mcpServers: { unimatrix: { command: 'node', args: ['/path/to/unimatrix-mcp-server.js'], env: { UNIMATRIX_API_KEY: 'your-api-key-here', UNIMATRIX_URL: 'https://unimatrix-web.fly.dev', }, }, }, }; function copyConfig() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(mcpConfig, null, 2)); setCopied(true); setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000); } return (
{/* Breadcrumb */}
Home {' / '} Setup Claude Desktop
{/* Hero */}

🤖 Connect Unimatrix to Claude Desktop

Configure in 5 minutes. Use @unimatrix in Claude to recall memories from all your conversations.

{/* Video */}
📹
{/* Step-by-step */}
{/* Step 1 */}
1

Get Your API Key

Go to your Unimatrix dashboard and copy your API key. You'll need this for authentication.

Get API Key →
{/* Step 2 */}
2

Find Your Config File

Open Claude Desktop and go to: ~/.config/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json

On Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json

{/* Step 3 */}
3

Add Unimatrix Configuration

Paste this configuration into your config file:

                    {JSON.stringify(mcpConfig, null, 2)}

⚠️ Replace your-api-key-here with your actual API key

{/* Step 4 */}
4

Restart Claude Desktop

Close Claude completely and reopen it. You should see a new "🏛️" icon (Unimatrix) in the tools menu.

{/* Step 5 */}
5

Test It Out

Try these commands in Claude:

@unimatrix recall "python recursion"

@unimatrix remember "React hooks are state management"

@unimatrix get_recent 10

{/* Troubleshooting */}

❓ Troubleshooting

Icon doesn't appear

Try restarting Claude again. If still missing, check that your JSON syntax is correct in the config file.

Command returns error

Make sure your API key is correct and your Unimatrix account is active.

Still stuck?

Check the help center or email hello@deployunimatrix.com

{/* Next Steps */}

🎉 What's Next?

You're all set! Claude can now recall your memories from across all your conversations. Try asking it to:

  • ✓ Recall a specific memory by topic
  • ✓ Continue a conversation from yesterday
  • ✓ Find code snippets you saved
Browser Extension Setup Local Ollama Setup

Features Pricing How It Works FAQ
Sign In Start Free
{/* HERO — STAGE 1 OF FUNNEL */}
{/* Gradient background */}

Your AI Remembers
Everything

Start a conversation with ChatGPT on your iPhone. Pick up your iPad. Open Claude. Full context, zero re-explaining. That's Unimatrix.

{/* CTA Button — Primary Conversion Point */}
Get Started Free See How It Works
{/* Trust signals */}

No credit card required • Works with any AI • Encrypted end-to-end

{/* FEATURES — STAGE 2: Value Prop */}

Why Choose Unimatrix?

Cross-LLM Continuity

ChatGPT → Claude → Gemini. Same conversation, full context. No re-explaining.

Encrypted by Default

End-to-end encryption. Server never sees plaintext. Your memories stay yours.

Cloud + Self-Hosted

Use cloud for convenience. Self-host for total privacy. Your choice.

Everywhere

Phone, tablet, desktop, Mac, Linux. Memory syncs instantly everywhere.

MCP Standard

Built on Model Context Protocol. No vendor lock-in. Open standard.

Zero API Dependency

Local embeddings. Proprietary AI. No external service calls needed.

{/* HOW IT WORKS — STAGE 3: Build confidence */}

How It Works

1

Create Your Account

Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card needed. Get 3 free workspaces immediately.

2

Connect Your LLMs

Add the Unimatrix MCP endpoint to Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible tool. Takes 2 minutes.

3

Start Remembering

Every conversation is stored, encrypted, and synced. Switch between LLMs. Same context everywhere.

Start Free Now
{/* PRICING — STAGE 4: Conversion decision */}

Simple, Transparent Pricing

No surprises. No hidden fees. Start free, upgrade when you need more.

{/* FREE */}

Free

$0/mo
  • 3 workspaces
  • 1,000 memories
  • 2 devices
  • Any LLM
  • End-to-end encrypted
Get Started
{/* PRO — FEATURED */}
MOST POPULAR

Pro

$9.99/mo
  • Unlimited workspaces
  • Unlimited memories
  • Unlimited devices
  • Priority support
  • Team sharing (coming)
Start 14-Day Free Trial
{/* ENTERPRISE */}

Enterprise

Custom
  • Self-hosted deployment
  • Team management
  • SLA + priority support
  • Custom integrations
  • Audit logging
Contact Sales
{/* FAQ — STAGE 5: Remove objections */}

Frequently Asked Questions

{[ { q: 'Is my data really private?', a: 'Yes. All memories are encrypted end-to-end with AES-256-GCM before leaving your device. Even we cannot read them.' }, { q: 'What happens if I switch LLMs?', a: 'Everything continues seamlessly. All your memories sync instantly. Switch between Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini anytime.' }, { q: 'Can I export my memories?', a: 'Yes. Export encrypted or decrypted JSON at any time. Full data portability guaranteed.' }, { q: 'Do you have an API?', a: 'Yes, via the Model Context Protocol. Connect any MCP-compatible tool. Standard, open protocol.' }, { q: 'Can I self-host?', a: 'Yes. Enterprise tier includes Docker self-hosted option with full privacy.' }, { q: 'How much data can I store?', a: 'Free: 1,000 memories. Pro: Unlimited. Enterprise: Custom limits.' }, ].map((item, i) => (

); } export function MCPArchitectureDiagram() { return (
{/* Clients */}
MCP CLIENTS
• Claude Desktop (via local stdio bridge)
• Cursor / Windsurf (direct streamable-http)
• Zed (experimental)
• Custom agents (HTTP + REST)
{/* Transport Layer */}
TRANSPORT
Local Bridge
npx @unimatrix/mcp-server
Direct HTTP
https://deployunimatrix.com/api/mcp
{/* Backend */}
BACKEND
• Hierarchical (Palaces → Locations)
• AES-256-GCM at rest
• Postgres + pgvector
• Full per-account audit logs
Diagram placeholder — Replace with clean architecture illustration in Figma / screenshots
Self-host option: Run the entire stack with Docker + PostgreSQL.

Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
